frictions.description: Two-tab layout only appears after running a backtest (tabs are conditional on session_state), not visible on initial page load. The validation contract says 'Main area has two tabs' which implies they should always be visible, but the implementation conditionally shows them.
frictions.resolution: Ran backtest first, then verified tabs. The behavior is intentional — welcome page shows before first backtest run.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Full end-to-end flow (VAL-CROSS-001) completed successfully. All sidebar controls present, two-tab layout works correctly after backtest, metric cards show all 6 required values (including Sortino Ratio), QuantStats tearsheet and Bokeh charts render as embedded HTML iframes, tab switching preserves results, and no matplotlib/unstyled elements found.
